race.comment: Wide open affair. LIGHTHOUSE LASS (10) hasn't won for 70 weeks but her recent form suggests this could be her drought-breaker. Made good late inroads but couldn't pick up the first couple over 1300m at Scone last start. The numbers say that form is good enough. EMALYN (6) added to her recent collection of minor placings when edged out over this course and distance 18 days ago. Looks very well treated after the claim so she gets her chance to grab a long overdue win. DIVO (1) just missed here last start and will be cherry ripe at the third run back from a spell. CALL ME SASSY (8) looks close to a win.
